# Durvalumab 相關新聞

[← 返回新聞總覽]({{ '/news/' | relative_url }})

---

<p class="key-answer" data-question="Durvalumab 有什麼相關新聞？">
<strong>Durvalumab</strong> 目前有 <strong>17 則</strong>相關新聞報導，預測適應症 20 個。
</p>

<div class="key-takeaway">
本頁整合 Durvalumab 的 AI 預測適應症與最新健康新聞，橘色標示的適應症表示近期有相關新聞報導。
</div>

<div class="drug-info-card">
<strong>藥物資訊</strong>
<ul>
<li><strong>原適應症</strong>：Non-Small Cell Lung Cancer (NSCLC)IMFINZI in combination with platinum-based chemotherapy as neoadjuvant treatment, followed by IMFINZI as monotherapy as adjuvant treatment, is indicated for the...</li>
<li><strong>證據等級</strong>：L2</li>
<li><strong>預測適應症</strong>（20 個）：<ul>
<li>prostatic urethra urothelial carcinoma（100.0%）</li>
<li>kidney pelvis sarcomatoid transitional cell carcinoma（100.0%）</li>
<li>infiltrating bladder urothelial carcinoma sarcomatoid variant（100.0%）</li>
<li>renal pelvis papillary urothelial carcinoma（100.0%）</li>
<li>transitional cell carcinoma（100.0%）</li>
<li>uterine ligament adenocarcinoma（99.9%）</li>
<li>endocervical carcinoma（99.9%）</li>
<li>adenoid cystic carcinoma of the cervix uteri（99.9%）</li>
<li>uterine ligament serous adenocarcinoma（99.9%）</li>
<li>signet ring cell variant cervical mucinous adenocarcinoma（99.9%）</li>
<li>intestinal variant cervical mucinous adenocarcinoma（99.9%）</li>
<li>uterine ligament mucinous adenocarcinoma（99.9%）</li>
<li>uterine ligament endometrioid adenocarcinoma（99.9%）</li>
<li>cervical adenosquamous carcinoma, glassy cell variant（99.9%）</li>
<li>endocervical type cervical mucinous adenocarcinoma（99.9%）</li>
<li>cervical mucinous adenocarcinoma, minimal deviation variant（99.9%）</li>
<li>uterine ligament clear cell adenocarcinoma（99.9%）</li>
<li>nasopharyngeal teratoma（99.8%）</li>
<li>odontogenic cyst（99.8%）</li>
<li>epiglottis neoplasm（99.8%）</li>
</ul></li>
</ul>
<p><a href="{{ '/drugs/durvalumab/' | relative_url }}">查看完整藥物報告 →</a></p>
</div>
